text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, AI can create paintings that look like famous artworks, compose original music, and even write stories. Some people worry that machines are taking over human creativity. However, there is an important difference: AI learns from existing data, while humans create from emotions, personal experiences, and imagination. AI-generated art can be impressive, but it lacks the deep meaning that comes from human life. Instead of replacing artists, AI can be a helpful tool—it can inspire new ideas, speed up the creative process, or help people who struggle with writing or drawing. The most exciting art happens when humans and machines work together.
